scripts.build:admins: turbo run build --filter=admins --concurrency=1 && cp -r apps/admins/.next/static apps/admins/.next/standalone/apps/admins/.next/static && cp -r apps/admins/public apps/admins/.next/standalone/apps/admins/public
scripts.build:clients: turbo run build --filter=clients --concurrency=1 && cp -r apps/clients/.next/static apps/clients/.next/standalone/apps/clients/.next/static && cp -r apps/clients/public apps/clients/.next/standalone/apps/clients/public
